CVE-2021-21772.title: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in the NMR::COpcPackageRead ...
CVE-2021-21772.summary: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in the NMR::COpcPackageReader::releaseZIP() functionality of 3MF Consortium lib3mf 2.0.0. A specially crafted 3MF file can lead to code execution. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.
